description: The Tripodi are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Vibo Valentia, Italy, allied with the Mancuso clan. They have branches in Lombardy, Lazio, and Veneto. In 2013, Operation Atlantide (later Lybra) led to arrests for vote-buying and corruption, and in 2014, an investigation targeted boss Nicola Tripodi for alleged no-show employment.
